notes: IMPORTANT: This is NOT a block test. Send a NORMAL chat message (no sensitive data) and capture the server's ACTUAL response format. We need to see: (1) the exact Content-Type header of the response, (2) the first 500 chars of the response body, (3) whether the response uses SSE text/event-stream or JSON application/json, (4) the exact line format (number prefix like '0:', '15:', etc.), (5) the JSON structure of each response line. Open DevTools Network tab BEFORE sending. After the response arrives, capture the response headers and body from the message.newChat request in the Network tab. This data is critical for building the correct warning template.
